meta.title: 文学经典解读
meta.description: Advanced native-level discourse on interpreting literary classics in Chinese: idioms, vivid depiction, and formal comparative/causal grammar.
meta.description_ko: 격조 높은 원어민 수준의 문학 고전 해석 담화: 성어, 생생한 묘사, 격식체 비교·인과 문형.

explanation.en: 「文学经典」(wénxué jīngdiǎn) means "literary classic".
explanation.ko: 「文学经典」(wénxué jīngdiǎn)는 '문학 고전'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「文学经典」是什么意思？(What does 文学经典 mean?)

explanation.en: 「言外之意」means "the implied meaning beyond the literal words".
explanation.ko: 「言外之意」는 '말 밖의 뜻, 함축된 의미'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「言外之意」是什么意思？(What does 言外之意 mean?)
choices: 没有明说但暗含的意思(implied meaning beyond the literal words)

explanation.en: 「意犹未尽」is an idiom meaning "feeling that the meaning/enjoyment hasn't been fully exhausted", leaving a lingering impression.
explanation.ko: 「意犹未尽」는 '여운이 남아 아직 다 표현되지 않은 듯한 느낌'을 뜻하는 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 「意犹未尽」是什么意思？(What does 意犹未尽 mean?)
choices: 感觉意味还没有完全表达完，令人回味(feeling that there's still more to be savored/expressed)

explanation.en: 「跃然纸上」is an idiom describing writing so vivid it seems to leap off the page.
explanation.ko: 「跃然纸上」는 글이 매우 생생해서 마치 종이 밖으로 튀어나올 듯하다는 뜻의 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 「跃然纸上」是什么意思？(What does 跃然纸上 mean?)
choices: 形象生动逼真，仿佛要从纸上跳出来(vividly lifelike, as if leaping off the page)

explanation.en: 「经久不衰」means "enduring popularity that doesn't fade over a long period".
explanation.ko: 「经久不衰」는 '오랫동안 인기가 시들지 않는다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 「经久不衰」是什么意思？(What does 经久不衰 mean?)
choices: 经久不衰(enduring popularity that doesn't wane over time)

explanation.en: 「文学经典」means "literary classic".
explanation.ko: 「文学经典」는 '문학 고전'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 这部作品历经百年依然被广泛阅读，堪称一部真正的___。(This work has been widely read for over a century, truly deserving the title of a literary classic.)

explanation.en: 「言外之意」means "implied meaning beyond the literal words".
explanation.ko: 「言外之意」는 '함축된 의미'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 这句看似平淡的对话，实则蕴含着深刻的___，值得细细品味。(This seemingly plain dialogue actually contains profound implied meaning, worth savoring carefully.)

explanation.en: 「意犹未尽」describes lingering enjoyment or interest.
explanation.ko: 「意犹未尽」는 여운이 남는 것을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 读完这部小说，我依然___，忍不住想要再读一遍。(After finishing this novel, I still felt there was more to be savored, unable to resist wanting to read it again.)

explanation.en: 「跃然纸上」describes writing so vivid it seems to leap off the page.
explanation.ko: 「跃然纸上」는 글이 매우 생생함을 묘사한다.

questions.prompt: 作者笔下的人物形象刻画得极为传神，仿佛___。(The characters depicted by the author are portrayed so vividly, as if leaping off the page.)

explanation.en: 「经久不衰」means "enduring popularity".
explanation.ko: 「经久不衰」는 '오랫동안 인기가 시들지 않는다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这部经典之所以能够___，是因为它触及了人性中永恒的主题。(The reason this classic has been able to enjoy enduring popularity is because it touches on eternal themes of human nature.)

explanation.en: 「刻画」means "to portray/depict".
explanation.ko: 「刻画」는 '묘사하다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这部作品___了那个时代普通人的悲欢离合，具有深刻的历史意义。(This work portrays the joys and sorrows of ordinary people of that era, with profound historical significance.)

explanation.en: 「与其〜不如〜」means "rather than 〜, it's better to 〜".
explanation.ko: 「与其〜不如〜」는 '~하느니 차라리 ~하는 게 낫다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 与其满足于表面的情节，___不如深入挖掘作品背后蕴含的哲理。(Rather than being satisfied with the surface plot, it's better to dig deep into the philosophical meaning embedded within the work.)

explanation.en: 「即使〜也〜」means "even if 〜, still 〜".
explanation.ko: 「即使〜也〜」는 '설령 ~일지라도 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这部作品___语言朴实无华，___蕴含着深刻的思想内涵。(Even though this work's language is plain and unadorned, it still contains profound intellectual depth.)

explanation.en: 「之所以〜是因为〜」emphasizes the reason.
explanation.ko: 「之所以〜是因为〜」는 이유를 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 这部作品之所以能够跨越时代引发共鸣，___是因为它探讨了人类共通的情感与困境。(The reason this work can transcend eras and resonate is precisely because it explores emotions and predicaments common to all humanity.)

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」means "once 〜, then 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」는 '일단 ~하면 곧 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一部作品一旦触及了人性的普遍主题，___能够跨越时空引发读者共鸣。(Once a work touches on universal themes of human nature, it can resonate with readers across time and space.)

explanation.en: 「归根结底〜还是〜」emphasizes the fundamental point.
explanation.ko: 「归根结底〜还是〜」는 근본적인 요점을 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 归根结底，一部作品能否成为经典___取决于其对人性和时代的深刻洞察。(In the final analysis, whether a work can become a classic still depends on its profound insight into human nature and its era.)

explanation.en: 「共同」means "jointly/together".
explanation.ko: 「共同」는 '함께'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 由此可见，语言的精妙与思想的深刻___成就了一部真正的文学经典。(From this we can see that both linguistic subtlety and depth of thought jointly make a true literary classic.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often/frequently".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 众所周知，真正伟大的文学作品___能够超越其所处的时代局限。(As everyone knows, truly great literary works are often able to transcend the limitations of their era.)

explanation.en: 「承载」(chéngzài) means "to carry/bear [meaning or emotion]".
explanation.ko: 「承载」(chéngzài)는 '담고 있다, 싣고 있다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这位作家的文字___了深厚的人文关怀，读来令人动容。(This writer's words carry profound humanistic concern, moving to read.)

explanation.en: 「留白」(liúbái) originally an art term for "blank space", figuratively means intentional ambiguity left for interpretation.
explanation.ko: 「留白」(liúbái)는 원래 미술 용어인 '여백'을 뜻하나 비유적으로 해석의 여지를 남긴 모호함을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 这部小说的结尾留下了大量___，引发读者无尽的遐想。(This novel's ending leaves a great deal of ambiguity, sparking readers' endless imagination.)

explanation.en: 「不如」must come before the verb phrase 深入挖掘〜: 不如深入挖掘 (not 深入不如挖掘).
explanation.ko: 「不如」는 동사구 '深入挖掘〜' 앞에 와야 하므로 '不如深入挖掘'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 与其满足于表面的情节，深入不如挖掘作品背后蕴含的哲理。(Rather than being satisfied with the surface plot, it's better to dig deep into the philosophical meaning embedded within the work.) — find the error
choices: 与其满足于表面的情节，不如深入挖掘作品背后蕴含的哲理。
与其满足于表面的情节，深入不如挖掘作品背后蕴含的哲理。
与其满足于表面的情节，不如挖掘深入作品背后蕴含的哲理。
与其满足于表面的情节，深入挖掘不如作品背后蕴含的哲理。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 这部作品之所以能够跨越时代引发共鸣，因为是它探讨了人类共通的情感与困境。(The reason this work can transcend eras and resonate is precisely because it explores emotions and predicaments common to all humanity.) — find the error
choices: 这部作品之所以能够跨越时代引发共鸣，是因为它探讨了人类共通的情感与困境。
这部作品之所以能够跨越时代引发共鸣，因为是它探讨了人类共通的情感与困境。
这部作品之所以能够跨越时代引发共鸣，是它因为探讨了人类共通的情感与困境。
这部作品之所以能够跨越时代引发共鸣，它是因为探讨了人类共通的情感与困境。

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」is the correct fixed pattern; 「才」does not match the immediate consequence implied by 一旦.
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」가 올바른 고정 문형이며 「才」는 '一旦'의 즉각적 결과와 맞지 않는다.

questions.prompt: 一部作品一旦触及了人性的普遍主题，能够才跨越时空引发读者共鸣。(Once a work touches on universal themes of human nature, it can resonate with readers across time and space.) — find the error
choices: 一部作品一旦触及了人性的普遍主题，就能够跨越时空引发读者共鸣。
一部作品一旦触及了人性的普遍主题，能够才跨越时空引发读者共鸣。
一部作品一旦触及了人性的普遍主题，才能够跨越时空引发读者共鸣。
一部作品一旦触及了人性的普遍主题，能够跨越才时空引发读者共鸣。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 与其满足于表面的情节，不如深入挖掘作品背后蕴含的哲理 ("Rather than being satisfied with the surface plot, it's better to dig deep into the philosophical meaning embedded within the work").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '与其满足于表面的情节，不如深入挖掘作品背后蕴含的哲理' (표면적 줄거리에 만족하느니 차라리 작품 이면의 철학적 의미를 깊이 파헤치는 게 낫다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 与其满足于表面的情节，__________作品背后蕴含的哲理。(Rather than being satisfied with the surface plot, it's better to dig deep into the philosophical meaning embedded within the work.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 一部作品一旦触及了人性的普遍主题，就能够跨越时空引发读者共鸣 ("Once a work touches on universal themes of human nature, it can resonate with readers across time and space").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '一部作品一旦触及了人性的普遍主题，就能够跨越时空引发读者共鸣' (작품은 일단 인간 본성의 보편적 주제를 건드리면 시공을 초월해 독자의 공감을 불러일으킬 수 있다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 一部作品一旦触及了人性的普遍主题，__________跨越时空引发读者共鸣。(Once a work touches on universal themes of human nature, it can resonate with readers across time and space.)
